basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (ICSR IIT Madras) has officially announced the Technician Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official ICSR IIT Madras website. Candidates who meet the prescribed eligibility criteria and hold M.Sc. in Physics or Chemistry, B.Tech, or B.E. in EE, ECE, or MME with 3 years of relevant experience can submit their online applications on or before 13 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc physics or chemistry, BTech, BE in EE, ECE, MME with 3 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: M.Sc in Physics or Chemistry, OR B.Tech or BE in Electrical Engineering (EE), Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), or Metallurgical and Materials Engineering (MME) Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in operating and regular maintenance of equipment like Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) in a research laboratory or industry R&D set-up.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 35,000/- Per Month (based on experience)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Technician Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Madras Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Madras Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Technician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc in Physics or Chemistry, OR B.Tech or BE in Electrical Engineering (EE), Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE), or Metallurgical and Materials Engineering (MME) Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in operating and regular maintenance of equipment like Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) in a research laboratory or industry R&D set-up.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Technician Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 35,000/- Per Month (based on experience)

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for submission of online application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Technician Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Madras Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Technician position?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application for the IIT Madras Technician recruitment is 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an M.Sc in Physics or Chemistry, or a B.Tech/BE in EE, ECE, or MME, along with 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technician role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 35,000/- per month, based on the candidate's experience.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Technician position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test/Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Technician post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Technician post at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is required for the Technician role?
faq.answer: Candidates need at least 3 years of experience in operating and maintaining equipment like Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) in a research laboratory or industry R&D setup.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity.
